# Metechi
> Metechi builds practical web and mobile products including CoachPad, Infinite Flux, SwiftQuote, and Verve.

Canonical: https://www.metechi.dev/
Contact: info@metechi.dev
Last updated: 2026-04-29

## Core Pages
- [Metechi - Web and Mobile Product Portfolio](https://www.metechi.dev/) - Product portfolio, support links, privacy references, product status, and public Metechi overview.
- [CoachPad - Tactical Board App for Coaches](https://www.metechi.dev/coachpad.html) - Tactical board app for coaches and trainers to create drills, animate formations, share tactics, and plan sessions.
- [Infinite Flux - Reflex Runner Game for Mobile Players](https://www.metechi.dev/infinite-flux.html) - Mobile reflex runner focused on lane switching, timing, focus energy, streak control, upgrades, and arcade scoring.
- [SwiftQuote - Quote and Invoice App for Freelancers](https://www.metechi.dev/swiftquote.html) - Quote and invoice app for freelancers and small businesses with PDF sharing, customer management, catalogs, and income tracking.
- [Verve - Premium Dating and Networking App](https://www.metechi.dev/verve.html) - Premium dating and networking app focused on privacy, compatibility, intentional conversations, and meaningful connections.
- [Metechi Privacy Policy](https://www.metechi.dev/privacy.html) - Website privacy overview and links to product-specific privacy policies.

## Product Summary
- CoachPad: sports coaching workflow, tactic animation, formation planning, and team communication.
- Infinite Flux: mobile arcade gameplay with lane switching, shards, streaks, focus energy, and upgrades.
- SwiftQuote: quotes, invoices, PDF sharing, customer management, product catalogs, and income tracking.
- Verve: privacy-focused dating and premium social networking with compatibility-driven matching.

## Public Verification
- CoachPad links to Google Play and the App Store.
- Verve links to Google Play.
- Product pages include platform, support, privacy, and last-updated context.
- Support contact: info@metechi.dev.
